title: ASUS ROG Strix G16 Gaming Laptop
description: Intel Core i9-14900HX, NVIDIA RTX 4070, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB SSD, 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display. Built for serious gamers with advanced cooling and RGB lighting.

title: ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED Ultrabook
description: Intel Core Ultra 7, 16GB LPDDR5X RAM, 512GB SSD, 14-inch 2.8K OLED display, ultra-slim design at just 1.2kg. Perfect for professionals on the go.

title: Acer Predator Helios 16 Gaming Laptop
description: Intel Core i7-14700HX, NVIDIA RTX 4060, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 512GB SSD, 16-inch WQXGA 165Hz IPS display. Aggressive design with superior thermal management.

title: Acer Swift Go 14 Ultrabook
description: Intel Core Ultra 5, 16GB LPDDR5X RAM, 512GB SSD, 14-inch 2.8K OLED display, lightweight at 1.3kg. AI-powered features for everyday productivity.

title: Apple MacBook Pro 16" M4 Pro
description: Apple M4 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, up to 24 hours battery life. The ultimate pro notebook.

title: Apple MacBook Air 15" M3
description: Apple M3 chip, 16GB unified memory, 256GB SSD, 15.3-inch Liquid Retina display, MagSafe charging, up to 18 hours battery. Impossibly thin at 11.5mm.

title: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
description: Intel Core Ultra 7, 32GB LPDDR5X RAM, 1TB SSD, 14-inch 2.8K OLED display, MIL-STD-810H certified. The gold standard for business laptops.

title: Lenovo Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Convertible
description: Intel Core Ultra 7, 16GB LPDDR5X RAM, 1TB SSD, 14-inch 4K OLED touchscreen, 360° hinge, Bowers & Wilkins speakers. Versatile premium convertible.

title: Dell XPS 15 (2025)
description: Intel Core Ultra 7, 16GB LPDDR5X RAM, 512GB SSD, 15.6-inch 3.5K OLED InfinityEdge display, CNC machined aluminum chassis. Stunning design meets performance.

title: Dell Inspiron 16 Plus
description: Intel Core i7-13700H, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 512GB SSD, 16-inch QHD+ display, ComfortView Plus. Reliable everyday performance for work and entertainment.
